title: Write no_agent cron job that runs shell wrapper and delivers to Telegram
completion_summary: no_agent cron job with --deliver telegram ran end-to-end inside the Firecracker VM. Script /root/.hermes/scripts/foundation-07-ping.sh emitted marker + UTC timestamp; hermes cron tick fired job 55d35beab953 (run record at /root/.hermes/cron/output/55d35beab953/2026-05-19_00-24-51.md); message arrived in the Telegram chat with @apprentice_hermes_bot byte-identical to the captured stdout. Three issues hit and resolved along the way: (1) /root/.hermes/scripts/ didn't exist (Hermes creates it lazily in _run_job_script) — mkdir before scp; (2) python-telegram-bot was a missing optional dep — installed via uv pip into the Hermes venv and added permanently to .firecracker/Dockerfile so the next rootfs rebuild gets it; (3) Telegram returned 'Chat not found' because a bot can't DM a user until the user has /start'd it — once started, delivery succeeded on retry. Deliverables: notes/foundation-07/foundation-07-ping.sh (the script), notes/foundation-07/proof.md (full trace). foundation milestone now 7/7.
